title: ctenitis gordonii
intro: Ctenitis gordonii, also known as Gordon's fern, is a plant species in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, tannins, and other bioactive compounds, which are believed to have antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, providing various health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and protecting against oxidative stress. Ctenitis gordonii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion in traditional herbal medicine, and its extracts have been studied for potential applications in the development of new therapeutic agents.
